text.en: I lost 8kg in 6 weeks using the P4 program. My energy levels are amazing and I feel like a new person. Highly recommend!
text.sw: Nilipoteza kilo 8 katika wiki 6 kwa kutumia programu ya P4. Viwango vyangu vya nishati ni vya ajabu na nahisi kama mtu mpya. Napendekeza sana!

text.en: Splina has improved my digestion and skin completely. My colleagues keep asking what my secret is. Best purchase I have made this year.
text.sw: Splina imeboresha usagaji wangu na ngozi kabisa. Wenzangu wanaendelea kuuliza siri yangu ni nini. Ununuzi bora nilioufanya mwaka huu.

text.en: I switched from regular coffee to Ginseng Coffee 3 months ago. No more afternoon crashes and my focus at work has improved so much.
text.sw: Nilibadilisha kutoka kahawa ya kawaida hadi Kahawa ya Ginseng miezi 3 iliyopita. Hakuna tena kupungukiwa nguvu mchana na umakini wangu kazini umeboreshwa sana.
